property.name: listViewObjectApiName
property.label: List View Object API Name
property.description: API name of the object list view this button is on (e.g. Case or Conversion__c). Used for Cancel/Submit navigation.

property.name: returnObjectApiName
property.label: Cancel Return Object API Name
property.description: Reserved for existing Lightning page assignments.

property.name: returnFilterName
property.label: Cancel Return Filter Name
property.description: Reserved for existing Lightning page assignments.
